title: Infosys to implement Oracle Cloud HCM for Telenor Shared Services
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a collaboration with Telenor Shared Services on October 03, 2025 to modernize TSS's HR operations through implementation of Oracle Cloud Human Capital Management. The project aims to standardize HR processes, enhance employee productivity and experience, streamline HR operations, and unify Human Capital Management, Financial Management, Supply Chain Management, and Projects Portfolio Management on a single platform. The release highlights Infosys's Oracle Cloud HCM implementation capabilities and its digital transformation work for the telecom industry. No contract value, duration, revenue impact, or implementation timeline was disclosed.
